_description: FitVTON runtime configuration. Fill in path fields after cloning (see project docs for recommended values). Empty path fields fall back to built-in defaults in system_config.py until set. Relative paths are resolved from the FitVTON directory.

models._description: HuggingFace model IDs (required) and optional local snapshot directories.

checkpoints._description: Directory containing shipped LoRA weight files (e.g. default_lora_weights.safetensors, texture_lora_weights.safetensors).

outputs._description: Default output directories for training and inference.

vlm_eval._description: OpenAI-compatible VLM API for fit-oriented evaluation (Fit-Oriented Evaluation Protocol). Set gateway (base URL) and api_key before running vlm_fit_eval.py.
